name: Mom
message: Those ponies! So beautiful. I’m very happy to hear you had a wonderful day. I’m so proud of you. Keep stretching, John sounds like a smart guy.

name: Nag
message: As a certified horse girl, I’m jealous

name: Cuca
message: Wow! Esos ponies están divinos, q emocionante me alegra tu excelente día y cruzar la milla 500 uff  felicitaciones!!!

name: Kee
message: The horses! My dream date…cute! lol
